header.title: Trash & Recovery
header.description: Recover deleted profiles or permanently erase them from your storage.

warning.title: Permanent deletion
warning.body: Restoring returns a profile to your list unchanged. Permanent delete removes it from the database; enable the option below to also erase its local browser data (cookies, cache, logins) from disk.

toolbar.eraseLocalData: Also erase local browser data on permanent delete

empty.title: Trash is empty
empty.noMatch: No deleted profiles match your search.
empty.none: You have no deleted profiles. Safe and clean!

confirm.purge: Permanently delete "{{title}}"? This cannot be undone.
confirm.purgeWithData: Permanently delete "{{title}}"? This cannot be undone and its local browser data will be erased.
confirm.bulkPurge_one: Permanently delete {{count}} profile? This cannot be undone.
confirm.bulkPurge_other: Permanently delete {{count}} profiles? This cannot be undone.
confirm.bulkPurgeWithData_one: Permanently delete {{count}} profile? This cannot be undone and local browser data will be erased.
confirm.bulkPurgeWithData_other: Permanently delete {{count}} profiles? This cannot be undone and local browser data will be erased.
confirm.emptyTrash_one: Permanently delete ALL {{count}} profile in the trash? This cannot be undone.
confirm.emptyTrash_other: Permanently delete ALL {{count}} profiles in the trash? This cannot be undone.
confirm.emptyTrashWithData_one: Permanently delete ALL {{count}} profile in the trash? This cannot be undone and local browser data will be erased.
confirm.emptyTrashWithData_other: Permanently delete ALL {{count}} profiles in the trash? This cannot be undone and local browser data will be erased.
